description: Color photograph inside a large airport terminal, a backlit silhouette scene: a woman stands pushing an older person seated in a wheelchair across a glossy, reflective tiled floor, both rendered as dark silhouettes. Behind them is a floor-to-ceiling glass curtain wall with diagonal structural bracing, through which a bright sky with clouds and an out-of-focus airfield are visible; rows of empty waiting-area seats line the background. The palette is blue and teal with reflections on the floor. There is no on-image text, headline, agency seal, or graphic overlay of any kind.
